description:
Prison Run is a game about escape, risk, and cleverness.
You are a prisoner desperately trying to break out of a grim high-security prison. The only path to freedom is using your wits, patience, and anything you can dig up from beneath the ground.

Dig. Find. Trade. Escape.
Explore the area, dig up hidden items, upgrade your gear, and sell your loot to a shady guard who looks the other way for money. But be careful every item you uncover can bring you closer to freedom… or to solitary confinement.
